results.title: France v Iraq World Cup game second half in Philadelphia delayed due to thunderstorms, FIFA says
results.description: Philadelphia: France and Iraq players were ‌left waiting ​in their dressing rooms at halftime after thunderstorms forced a delay to the start of the second half of their World Cup clash on Monday. A FIFA spokesperson said the game would resume at ⁠least 30 minutes from when the halftime break started. "Please exit the open seating area and seek shelter in the stadium as directed by the stadium ‌staff. A severe thunderstorm is approaching," an advisory message on the scoreboard read. France were leading 1-0 after Kylian ‌Mbappe scored his 15th World Cup goal ‌in the 14th minute. Fans return to the stands as the second half is delayed due to severe weather. Picture credit: Reuters There was no indication on ‌when the match would ‌restart. "There was a warning, then it disappeared, then it came back... I've ​stopped updating the ‌players as ​it changes every 30 seconds," ⁠France coach Didier Deschamps said. "We're waiting... And afterwards, the important thing will be to have time for another ​warm-up ⁠to get ⁠the team back on track." World Cup matches in the United States can face lengthy delays because FIFA must comply ⁠with local lightning safety regulations. Under U.S. protocols, play is suspended immediately if lightning is detected within an eight-mile (13-km) radius of a stadium and can only resume after 30 minutes have passed without a ‌further strike. Any new lightning detection resets the countdown, meaning delays can ​stretch for several hours if thunderstorms persist. FIFA has no fixed time limit after which a match must be abandoned, with each situation assessed on a case-by-case ​basis.

results.title: China accuses Japan of ‘harassment’ during far-seas aircraft carrier training
results.description: Beijing said the Japanese side had conducted "dangerous" close-in reconnaissance while the Chinese Navy's Liaoning aircraft carrier flotilla was training.

results.title: Climate forum warns of threats to Lanka’s marine and amphibian biodiversity from El Niño, La Niña
results.description: The Parliamentary Climate Forum has drawn attention to the growing challenges faced in protecting Sri Lanka’s marine biodiversity and amphibian ecosystems from the impacts of El Niño and La Niña climate phenomena. results.title: Comedian Carlos Mencia pleads not guilty to 12 felony charges of failure to pay taxes
results.description: Comedian Carlos Mencia has pleaded not guilty to 12 felony charges alleging he failed to report or pay taxes on more than US$8 million in earnings.

results.title: AI Acquisition building infra for AI agent economy
results.description: AI Acquisition was built on the belief that AI agents are the new operating layer for businesses, and this belief sits at the center of a broader shift unfolding across the artificial intelligence market. Businesses started adopting AI primarily through applications that assisted users with specific tasks, but now attention is turning toward AI agents designed not merely to assist with work but to perform it. The post AI Acquisition building infra for AI agent economy appeared first on Digital Journal .

results.title: Mobile County remains on track to spend all of its COVID-19 relief funds by deadline
results.description: The Mobile County Commission voted Monday to extend the timeframe on several projects funded by a federal COVID-19 grant program.

results.title: 9k-Mile 2014 Mini Cooper John Cooper Works Roadster 6-Speed
results.description: This 2014 Mini Cooper John Cooper Works Roadster remained with the original owner in Utah until 2026 and now has 9k miles. Powered by a turbocharged 1.6-liter inline-four paired with a six-speed manual transaxle, the convertible is finished in Midnight Black Metallic over Carbon Black Lounge leather with red accents. Equipment includes 18" multi-spoke wheels, heated Sport seats, a Harman Kardon sound system, xenon headlights, a Black soft top, and Brembo brakes. Recently acquired by the selling dealer, this R59 Cooper John Cooper Works Roadster is now offered with two keys, a clean Carfax report, and a clean Pennsylvania title.
